note: Bot offline — no trades generated today. Synthesis captures escalating offline anomalies.

anomalies.detail: Bot has been offline since ~2026-04-23. The 14-day (336h) escalation threshold was crossed at ~2026-05-07T00:00Z. All learning systems are deeply stalled.
anomalies.escalation: URGENT — every additional hour deepens A/B backlog. 98 rules at treatment_wr=null cannot graduate.

anomalies.detail: 98 rules in feedback/graduated_rules.json have confidence >= 75% but cannot be evaluated without live trade data. Rules like TRENDING_EARLY_HOLD_GUARD (88%), ILLIQUID_HOLD_TIMEOUT_RULE (87%), TRENDING_MIN_HOLD_2H (80%) are proven by historical analysis but unconfirmed by live outcomes.
4 consecutive losses at shutdown. Circuit breaker threshold is 5. Soft-start protocol required on restart.

anomalies.value: 8/8 runtime graduated rules — times_correct=0 for all
anomalies.detail: All 8 runtime rules in data/llm/graduated_rules.json have times_correct=0. Outcome callback wiring unverified. Must monitor first 5 closed trades after restart.

anomalies.value: CONF_60_70_all_block: treatment_wr=0.463 = baseline_wr=0.463 — zero net improvement
anomalies.detail: The only A/B rule with treatment_wr data shows no improvement vs baseline. This rule is superseded by the live runtime rule conf_floor_70_v1 (which penalizes -20pts). CONF_60_70_all_block should be archived to reduce A/B noise.
anomalies.action: Archive CONF_60_70_all_block — runtime conf_floor_70_v1 is the active implementation.

anomalies.value: llm_regime column empty in trades.csv — 12 regime A/B rules unmeasurable
anomalies.detail: Even when the bot restarts, regime-based A/B rules cannot be measured unless the llm_regime column is written to trades.csv at trade close.

anomalies.value: 48h stale — live_edge_data.json last updated from bot-active session
anomalies.detail: ETH_SHORT+trending+morning edge data (80% WR) is 48h stale. Historical pattern still valid but needs live confirmation post-restart.

tomorrows_focus.priority_action: RESTART BOT — cd bot && python run.py paper

CRITICAL: Verify times_correct increments in data/llm/graduated_rules.json after first closed trade
If times_correct still 0 after 5 closed trades — outcome callback is broken, requires immediate investigation
